sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113917" key="xhra/mbh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χηράμβη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n113917.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">scallop,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0232.tlg001:198" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archil.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">198</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0524.tlg001:44" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sophr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
